title: POET to Acquire Tennessee-based Bioethanol Plant
content: POET has announced an agreement to acquire Green Plains Obion, a bioethanol facility in northwestern Tennessee. The move will add 120 million gallons of production capacity annually and strengthen POETâ€™s access to southeastern US markets. â€œThis acquisition enables POET to produce even more high-quality, American-made biofuels and bioproducts â€” creating grain markets for our farmers, reducing our dependence on foreign oil and empowering rural communities to play a key role in strengthening the global bioeconomy,â€ said Jeff Broin, POET founder and CEO. Once finalised, the transaction will expand POETâ€™s portfolio to 35 bioprocessing facilities across nine states, bringing its total annual production capacity to 3.1 billion gallons of bioethanol.
author: Analysts Account
